stemHtml: For take-off distance calculations in a Performance class B aircraft being operated for Commercial Air Transport, the wind factorisation applies to (1) _____ aircraft. The factored wind must not be (2) _____ of the headwind and not (3) _____ of the tailwind.

options.c: (1) both SEP and MEP; (2) more than 50%; (3) less than 150%
options.d: (1) both SEP and MEP; (2) less than 150%; (3) more than 50%
